rule3.title: Scoring Rule
points: Minimum 4 out of 5 correct answers to pass the arena challenge.

results.title: Arena Results
results.excellent: Excellent work! You correctly analyzed all AI use cases and chose the right tools every time.
results.misconceptions: You successfully identified and corrected common AI misconceptions.
results.good_progress: Good progress! You’re understanding how to choose the right AI tools, but a few cases need more attention.
results.good_start: This is a good start. Revisit the cases to better understand when and how AI should be used.
